overview: Gayatri Vidya Parishad College of Engineering (GVPCE), founded in 1996, is a premier autonomous engineering institution located in Visakhapatnam, Andhra Pradesh. It is highly regarded as one of the top private engineering colleges in the state, known for its academic rigor, research-led environment, and strong industry linkages. The college offers a wide range of undergraduate and postgraduate programs, with a particularly strong reputation in Computer Science, Electronics, and Mechanical engineering.
accreditation: UGC Autonomous status. Accredited by NAAC with an 'A' Grade. All eligible undergraduate programs are NBA accredited. Approved by AICTE and affiliated with JNTU-Kakinada (JNTUK).

coursesAndFees.course: B.Tech (CSE, AI&ML, Data Science, ECE, EEE, Civil, Mechanical, IT, Chemical, Robotics)
coursesAndFees.eligibility: 10+2 with Physics, Chemistry, and Mathematics + AP EAPCET rank
Diploma in Engineering with valid AP ECET rank

coursesAndFees.course: M.Tech (Specialized branches in CSE, VLSI, Structural Engg, etc.)
coursesAndFees.eligibility: B.E./B.Tech with 50% aggregate + GATE / AP PGECET score
Graduation with Mathematics at 10+2 or Degree level + AP ICET rank

admissions.admissionProcess: Admissions are strictly merit-based through state-level web counseling (APSCHE). 70% of seats (Category A) are filled via entrance exam ranks. 30% (Category B) are Management Quota seats filled based on institutional merit. Counseling Code: GVPE.
admissions.importantDates: AP EAPCET 2026: May 12–18, 2026; AP ICET 2026: May 7, 2026; AP PGECET 2026: April 1 - May 26, 2026 (Registration window); Counseling: July–August 2026.

facilities: Central Library with Digital Resource Center
Separate Hostels for Boys and Girls
campus.specialNote: GVPCE is known for its strong 'Technical Societies' and research culture. It maintains several Centers of Excellence in collaboration with companies like IBM and National Instruments. The campus is located in the scenic Madhurawada valley, providing a tranquil yet tech-focused academic environment.
